'''hathomo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ibon|ibon]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-th-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ibon|ibon]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| hathomo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæthemeth|hæthemeth]] || [[word:hæthemej|hæthemej]] || [[word:hæthemesh|hæthemesh]] || [[word:hætheme|hætheme]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:hathothomoth|hathothomoth]] || [[word:hathothomoj|hathothomoj]] || [[word:hathothomosh|hathothomosh]] || [[word:hathothomo|hathothomo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:hathomoth|hathomoth]] || [[word:hathomoj|hathomoj]] || [[word:hathomosh|hathomosh]] || [[word:hathomo|hathomo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:hathofmoth|hathofmoth]] || [[word:hathofmoj|hathofmoj]] || [[word:hathofmosh|hathofmosh]] || [[word:hathofmof|hathofmof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hathomotho|hathomotho]] || [[word:hathomojo|hathomojo]] || [[word:hathomosho|hathomosho]] || [[word:hathomoko|hathomoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hathomoth|hathomoth]] || [[word:hathomoj|hathomoj]] || [[word:hathomosh|hathomosh]] || [[word:hathomo|hathomo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hathomothol|hathomothol]] || [[word:hathomojol|hathomojol]] || [[word:hathomoshol|hathomoshol]] || [[word:hathomokol|hathomokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hathomothotho|hathomothotho]] || [[word:hathomojojo|hathomojojo]] || [[word:hathomoshosho|hathomoshosho]] || [[word:hathomoko|hathomoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hathomothon|hathomothon]] || [[word:hathomojon|hathomojon]] || [[word:hathomoshon|hathomoshon]] || [[word:hathomokon|hathomokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hathomothoro|hathomothoro]] || [[word:hathomojoro|hathomojoro]] || [[word:hathomoshoro|hathomoshoro]] || [[word:hathomokoro|hathomokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7318718}}
